RESTAURANT.description: Dine-in restaurants, food trucks, caterers, food stalls, or eateries serving main meals.
rules: Must offer prepared meals or dining experiences.
Includes traditional Filipino restaurants, diners, buffet spaces, and specialized food trucks.

CAFE.description: Coffee shops, bakeries (panaderya), bubble tea shops, dessert parlors, cake shops.
rules: Primarily serves coffee, tea, pastries, bakery goods, or light desserts.
Includes panaderias baking fresh pandesal, ube cake makers, and halo-halo dessert stalls.

SHOP.description: Retail stores, grocery shops, Asian/Filipino supermarkets, convenience stores, sari-sari shops selling imported ingredients or goods.
rules: Sells physical packaged ingredients, imported groceries, clothing, or merchandise directly to consumers.
Must be a retail store or supermarket space.

CHURCH.description: Christian and Catholic churches, Tagalog mass fellowships, religious groups.
rules: A house of worship or organized religious community group holding regular services.
Provides chaplaincy or mass services tailored to the Filipino community.

GOVERNMENT.description: Official Philippine government listings, consulates, embassies, and honorary consular services.
rules: Must be an official department, embassy, consulate, or designated consular service of the Republic of the Philippines.

COMMUNITY.description: Organized clubs, community associations, non-profits, student clubs, and structured support groups.
rules: An organized group of individuals collaborating for community welfare, cultural preservation, support, or advocacy.
Must be a non-profit association, club, or community organization.
DOES NOT include local commercial business services (like tax services, travel agencies, cargo forwarders, etc.).

SERVICES.description: Professional and local business services that are not shops, food venues, government offices, or churches.
rules: A commercial entity offering professional, trade, or personal services to the community.
Includes tax accountants, migration agents, mechanics, logistics/freight providers (balikbayan boxes), hair salons, and travel agencies.
DOES NOT include grocery shops or restaurants.
